summary: Nature Risk Module comprehensive testing completed. All 36 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all 6 tabs (Dashboard, Portfolio, Water Risk, Biodiversity, ENCORE, GBF) with proper data loading and interactions.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions 'width(-1) and height(-1) should be greater than 0' - this is a Recharts library issue that occurs during initial render but charts render correctly after

critical_code_review_comments: Overall code quality is good with proper separation of concerns
Seed data is well-structured with realistic ENCORE, biodiversity, and water risk data
Frontend components use proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Test user created via MongoDB: naturerisk@test.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Nature Risk Module fully implemented and tested. All APIs use seed data (no external API dependencies). Key endpoints: Dashboard (/api/v1/nature-risk/dashboard/summary), Scenarios (/api/v1/nature-risk/scenarios), ENCORE (/api/v1/nature-risk/encore/sectors, /dependencies), Water Risk (/api/v1/nature-risk/water-risk/locations, /analyze, /risk-report), Biodiversity (/api/v1/nature-risk/biodiversity/sites), Portfolio (/api/v1/nature-risk/portfolio/analyze), GBF (/api/v1/nature-risk/gbf-targets, /gbf-alignment). Frontend uses react-router at /nature-risk with 6 tabs.
passed_tests: Nature Risk page loads at /nature-risk route
All 6 tabs visible: Dashboard, Portfolio, Water Risk, Biodiversity, ENCORE, GBF
Dashboard KPIs: Total Assessments (15), High Risk Entities (4), Water Stress Locations (8/25), Biodiversity Overlaps (15)
Dashboard charts: Sector Risk Distribution, GBF Target Alignment, Nature Risk Trend
Portfolio tab: Scenario checkboxes (6 scenarios), Run Analysis button works
Portfolio results: Holdings Analyzed (3), Avg LEAP Score (2.08), High Risk Holdings (0), Exposure at Risk ($6.6M)
Water Risk tab: 10 locations displayed, location selection shows detailed analysis
Water Risk analysis: Baseline Risk, 2050 Projection, chart, recommendations
Biodiversity tab: 17 sites displayed with filters by site type
Biodiversity site types: World Heritage (2), Ramsar Wetland (3), KBA (6), Protected Area (4), IBA (2)
ENCORE tab: Sector dropdown with 18 sectors, dependencies load on selection
GBF tab: Aligned (1), Partial (1), Not Aligned (0), Overall Score (62%)
GBF tab: All 23 targets displayed with alignment scores

mocked_apis.note: All APIs return real data from seed data (no external API dependencies)
